title: Single molecule and single cell epigenomics.
author: Hyun BR McElwee JL Soloway PD
content: S-EPMC4300266 PMC4300266 Single molecule and single cell epigenomics. Dynamically regulated changes in chromatin states are vital for normal development and can produce disease when they go awry. Accordingly, much effort has been devoted to characterizing these states under normal and pathological
